The '''First Battle of Tatooine''' was initiated by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Background==
[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] forces under [[General/Legends|General]] [[Sev'rance Tann/Legends|Sev'rance Tann]] arrived on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] after she had been informed by [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] that [[Boorka]], a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] living on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], had valuable information for the Separatists. After stocking up on supplies on the neighboring [[Kaer Orbital Platform]] in the [[Siskeen system/Legends|Siskeen system]], Tann's forces arrived on Tatooine.

==The battle==
[[File:First_Battle_of_Tatooine2.jpg|thumb|left|200px|[[Sev'rance Tann/Legends|Sev'rance Tann]] standing in front of the burning spaceport.]]

First, Tann fought her way through Boorka's guards, impressing him greatly. Boorka agreed to give Tann his information concerning the [[Decimator (war machine)|Decimator]], but only if she destroyed the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] occupied spaceport nearby.

Tann and her [[Droid/Legends|droid]] forces pushed through and overpowered the Republic defenses and demolished the spaceport, succeeding in Boorka's task. The Hutt finally gave up his information, which was that the Republic was building a massive weapon called the Decimator on [[Eredenn Prime]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
